title: Define Blueprint
expectation: Use a feature-branch worktree under the canonical worktree location as the only mutable surface for this process; never edit blueprint files from the shared repository checkout. Review relevant existing blueprints, including the canonical Agentish sections blueprint when defining or restructuring a subject blueprint, create or update the blueprint layer needed for the task from that worktree branch, commit the blueprint changes, merge the branch into development, and push development to origin.
idlePrompt: If the blueprint work is complete, reply only with 'done: blueprint defined'. If you are truly blocked on missing user information, reply only with 'blocked: blueprint clarification required'. Otherwise resume the blueprint work immediately and make real progress instead of giving only a status update.

steps.title: Create or use the feature-branch worktree surface
Review relevant existing blueprints and Agentish sections
Create or update the needed blueprint layer
